description_long: This is a long, outdoor bench constructed with horizontal wooden slats forming both the seat and the backrest, supported by ornate, black metal legs and frame. The wood appears to be stained a warm brown, giving the bench a classic and inviting look suitable for parks or public spaces. The metal frame features decorative curves and provides sturdy support at each end and in the center. The bench is designed to accommodate multiple people, with a backrest that runs the full length for comfort. There are no armrests, allowing for easy access from either side. The overall design is robust and weather-resistant, ideal for urban or park environments.
description: A long wooden slat bench with a full-length backrest and decorative black metal supports, designed for outdoor public use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden slats and the decorative black metal leg.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the bench, the continuous backrest, and the three supporting legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, highlighting the slat arrangement and metal support.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden slats and the structure of the metal frame.
attribute_leg_design: decorative black metal legs with curved supports
